entries.title: Blocks admin index.
entries.notes: Shows reusable blocks, component/search columns, filters, and table actions.
entries.useCase: An administrator scans reusable blocks by component, usage, status, and search/filter state.

entries.title: Create/edit block form with block assets.
entries.notes: Capture the component, display, settings, translations, and asset configuration tabs.
entries.useCase: An editor configures a reusable block, its display settings, translations, and block assets.

entries.title: Block layouts relation manager.
entries.notes: Shows which layouts currently use a reusable block.
entries.useCase: An editor checks which layouts use a reusable block before editing or deleting it.

entries.title: Layouts admin index with Layout Builder table extensions.
entries.notes: Capture package-specific layout table columns, filters, and actions.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews layout records with Layout Builder table extensions and actions.

entries.title: Page form content-first layout editor.
entries.notes: Requires a seeded page and layout with editable block assets.
entries.useCase: An editor manages page content through the content-first layout editor for seeded block assets.

entries.title: Page hero editor extension.
entries.notes: Shows hero-specific page schema fields added by the package.
entries.useCase: An editor configures the hero fields injected into the page schema.

entries.title: Public main content layout render.
entries.notes: Anonymous public page render with seeded blocks; must expose no admin/editor state.
entries.useCase: An anonymous visitor sees seeded layout blocks rendered as safe public HTML.

entries.title: Public named layout area render.
entries.notes: Anonymous render of a named layout area such as header; must expose no authoring metadata.
entries.useCase: An anonymous visitor sees a named layout area, such as a header, rendered without authoring metadata.

entries.title: Layout health dashboard widget.
entries.notes: Capture when the host admin dashboard enables this widget.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews layout health counts when the host dashboard enables the widget.

entries.title: Recent layout activity dashboard widget.
entries.notes: Capture when the host admin dashboard enables this widget.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews recent layout changes when the host dashboard enables the widget.
